lines.speaker: Competition Judge
lines.text: Hello again, do you need reminding of the rules?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Competition Judge
lines.text: The rules are very simple:

lines.speaker: Competition Judge
lines.text: You're given 10 shots at the targets, for each hit you will receive points. At the end you'll be awarded 1 ticket for every 10 points.

lines.speaker: Competition Judge
lines.text: The tickets can be exchanged for goods from our stores. Good luck!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I've got it.

lines.speaker: Competition Judge
lines.text: Glad to hear it, good luck!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How am I doing so far?

lines.speaker: Competition Judge
lines.text: So far your score is: 0. You haven't started yet.

lines.speaker: Competition Judge
lines.text: So far your score is: [number]. Not bad, keep going.

lines.speaker: Competition Judge
lines.text: So far your score is: [number]. You're pretty good, keep it up.

lines.speaker: Competition Judge
lines.text: Well done. Your score is: [number]. For that score you will receive [number] Archery tickets. Would you like to try again for another 200 coins?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure, I'll give it a go.

lines.speaker: Competition Judge
lines.text: Great! That will be 200 coins then please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I haven't got the money.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Competition Judge
lines.text: Hello there, would you like to take part in the archery competition? It only costs 200 coins to enter.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure, I'll give it a go.

lines.speaker: Competition Judge
lines.text: Great! That will be 200 coins then please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oops, I don't have enough coins on me...

lines.speaker: Competition Judge
lines.text: Never mind, come back when you've got enough.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are the rules?

lines.speaker: Competition Judge
lines.text: The rules are very simple:

lines.speaker: Competition Judge
lines.text: You're given 10 shots at the targets, for each hit you will receive points. At the end you'll be awarded 1 ticket for every 10 points.

lines.speaker: Competition Judge
lines.text: The tickets can be exchanged for goods from our stores. Do you want to give it a go? Only 200 coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.
